ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer assigned by the Euridis Association */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer and their products */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the device */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the device was manufactured (lower two digits only) */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID related to the type of equipment, assigned by the Euridis Association */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Manufacturing serial number of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Exact date of production */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty period */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics or reference to performance metrics */,
  "assigned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to manage the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_assigned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
